message:
🎨 Replace status dots with icons in ClusterHealth card

- Green CheckCircle for healthy clusters
- Yellow WifiOff for offline clusters
- Orange AlertTriangle for degraded clusters
- Removed redundant offline icon from cluster row
- Matches the icon style used in Clusters page

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:

   const dotSize = size === 'sm' ? 'w-2 h-2' : 'w-3 h-3'
 
   // Map to solid colors for the dot
